title: [FIRRTL][circt-reduce] Instance Stubber Crash w/ Refs
body:
FIRRTL `instance-stubber` reduction crashes if it is given refs. Consider:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.module private @Bar(
    out %ref: !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<32>>
  ) {
  }
  firrtl.module private @Baz(
    in %v_3: !firrtl.anyref
  ) {
    %Bar_ref = firrtl.instance Bar @Bar(
      out ref: !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<32>>
    )
  }
  firrtl.extmodule @Foo()
}
```

Running this will crash the instance-stubber:

``` console
# circt-reduce -skip-initial -test='exit 0' instance-stubber.0.mlir -include instance-stubber -o /dev/null 2>&1
Reading input
Testing input with `exit 0`
Initial module has size 286
Trying reduction `instance-stubber`
Assertion failed: (isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"), function cast, file Casting.h, line 560.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: circt-reduce -skip-initial "-test=exit 0" instance-stubber.0.mlir -include instance-stubber -o /dev/null
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  circt-reduce             0x000000010429fc34 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 56
1  circt-reduce             0x000000010429db1c llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 172
2  circt-reduce             0x00000001042a06dc SignalHandler(int, __siginfo*, void*) + 300
3  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x000000018fd516a4 _sigtramp + 56
4  libsystem_pthread.dylib  0x000000018fd17848 pthread_kill + 296
5  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000018fc209e4 abort + 124
6  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000018fc1fc18 err + 0
7  circt-reduce             0x00000001053f4068 llvm::StdThreadPool::wait() (.cold.1) + 0
8  circt-reduce             0x00000001045d60d8 circt::firrtl::patterns::AddOfPad::~AddOfPad() + 0
9  circt-reduce             0x00000001051d44ac (anonymous namespace)::invalidateOutputs(mlir::ImplicitLocOpBuilder&, mlir::Value, llvm::SmallDenseMap<mlir::Type, mlir::Value, 8u, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::Type, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::Type, mlir::Value>>&, bool) + 640
10 circt-reduce             0x00000001051d3ab8 (anonymous namespace)::InstanceStubber::rewrite(circt::firrtl::InstanceOp) + 808
11 circt-reduce             0x000000010422b0dc execute(mlir::MLIRContext&) + 3988
12 circt-reduce             0x0000000104229ebc main + 300
13 dyld                     0x000000018f976b98 start + 6076
zsh: abort      circt-reduce -skip-initial -test='exit 0' instance-stubber.0.mlir -include  -
```
code_blocks: Running this will crash the instance-stubber:
